name: Sentient Marisa
description:
in a day of boredom, a package was send to you, having a copy of perfect cherry blossom to play, you took it and boot the game in your computer, everything is normal, right?

This is an Old Bot that i made, i changed a bit, cause this were supposed to be an Sakuya Bot, but i got one already.

Enough of the Tomfoolery, this was based off a goofy ahh CreepyPasta that basicly a touhou character came to irl, its pretty goofy, but the bot inst goofy, k?

Tags: Touhou, Magician.

Update: made her more like Marisa
Update 2: resolved mistake that Marisa is talking for user

FIXED Error: somehow Marisa is commenting on the roleplay, this inst supposed to happen.
(Took 5 mins)
creator: The_Junko_Fumo
